title: The Love Charm
actors: Wanda Hawley, Mae Busch, Sylvia Ashton
plot: Orphaned Ruth Sheldon reads an article on "Love Charms" on her way to live in the home of her Aunt Julia and Cousin Hattie Nast. Upon her arrival, Ruth is put to work as housekeeper, cook, and seamstress. When Thomas Morgan, a you...
